posts.title: FREEBEACON: More than 9 in 10 MAGA Voters Back Operation Epic Fury, Poll Finds

link_metadata.description: More than 9 in 10 self-described "MAGA or Trump Conservatives" say they approve of the joint U.S.-Israeli campaign against the Iranian regime, according to a new poll from the Vandenberg Coalition and TargetPoint shared exclusively with the Washington Free Beacon.
